Projects.Name: Call for Action
Projects.Oneliner: A game where you complete menial tasks within a timelimit or else get punished
Description: This project was created by me as a solo developer in 36 hours during a gamejam hosted by Study assotiation XP. In this game you complete small tasks before the timer runs out on said task. If you fail 3 in 1 day, the day will end and you will get 1 strike. If you get 3 strikes you are out. Every day, more tasks will be added with different time limits and different difficulty levels. On day 5, no more tasks will be added, but the time you have on each task will be shortened.
The tasks are not difficult, but remember! If you need help, you can always call 6.

Projects.Name: Shadows of Singraven
Projects.Oneliner: A puzzle, horror game about the legend of 'De non van Singraven'.
Description: This game was created for Project Tweeduuster. A project set up by Mark Boerrichter to bring the myths and legends from the Twente region of the Netherlands to the new generation. In this game, you play as a one of the last witchhunters in the netherlands and you have been tasked to find out what has happening at Singraven Manor. The game itself is a small first-person semi-open-world puzzle horror game created in Unreal Engine 5.4

Over 500 years ago, Singraven Manor was a convent. The nun died in mysterious circumstances. She was unfairly sentenced and bricked alive into the wall by other nuns. Every soul living in Singraven heard her cries and screams until the nun’s last breath.

100 years past, the Netherlands was the first to stop executing witches. While magic faded, a new conflict arose: Protestants clashed with Catholics. Yet, farmers still believed in the paranormal. Singraven owners are terrified, and as the last witch hunter, your mission is to uncover the truth. Do you hear it? The nun is screaming... Can you feel it? It is your heartbeat.

Projects.Name: Tower of Masks
Projects.Oneliner: A 2D, Topdown puzzle game where you use the abilties of masks to get through rooms.
Description: This game was made during Global Gamejam 2026 with as theme Mask. The game itself is a 2D, Top-Down, puzzle game where you have to use the power of the masks to get through the different rooms.
